data.name: MY WIFE IS A MAID
data.detailed_description:
Ordinary married life may not be as simple as it seems.

You are a husband who works from morning till night, while your wife stays at home and works as a housekeeper. But new people are starting to come into her life.

Game features:

🔑 The cuckold's point of view – a story through the eyes of a man who consciously becomes a cuckold.

🖱️ A combination of visual novel and point-and-click – explore surroundings to uncover hidden details.

🎭 Psychological drama – themes of jealousy, trust, submission, and the strange pleasure of watching.

🎨 A seductive atmosphere – every scene is filled with tension and anticipation.

How far are you willing to go in the role of a cuckold husband? 👀

data.short_description: MY WIFE IS A MAID is a provocative visual novel with point & click elements. You are a cuckold husband who submits and simultaneously enjoys watching his wife explore pleasure with other men.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 462 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 462 MB 可用空間
